parsing_rationale: The provided document is not a functional specification but a 'Specification Quality Checklist' for a project called CourseHub API. It validates that a specification exists and meets quality standards, but it does not contain the actual functional requirements, goals, or scope of the feature itself. Consequently, the elements extracted are the quality constraints implied by the checklist, and all core specification sections are marked as missing since this is a meta-document.

project_info.brief_explanation: Quality assurance checklist to validate the completeness and readiness of the CourseHub API specification.
project_info.source_context: Validation document ensuring the spec.md file is ready for planning.

sections.title: Specification Quality Checklist: CourseHub API
sections.raw_content:
**Purpose**: Validate that the CourseHub API specification is complete, testable, and ready for planning.
**Created**: 2026-06-27
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

sections.title: Content Quality
sections.raw_content:
- [x] No implementation details (languages, frameworks, APIs) are exposed in the feature definition.
- [x] The specification focuses on user value and business needs.
- [x] The content is written for non-technical stakeholders as well as delivery teams.
- [x] All mandatory sections are completed.

sections.title: Requirement Completeness
sections.raw_content:
- [x] No [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] markers remain.
- [x] Requirements are testable and unambiguous.
- [x] Success criteria are measurable.
- [x] Success criteria are technology-agnostic.
- [x] Acceptance scenarios are defined for primary user flows.
- [x] Edge cases are identified.
- [x] Scope is clearly bounded.
- [x] Dependencies and assumptions are identified.

sections.title: Feature Readiness
sections.raw_content:
- [x] All functional requirements have clear acceptance criteria.
- [x] User scenarios cover the primary flows.
- [x] The feature is aligned with the measurable outcomes defined in Success Criteria.
- [x] The specification avoids implementation detail leakage.

sections.title: Notes
sections.raw_content: - All checklist items are complete and the specification is ready to proceed to planning.

elements.content: No implementation details (languages, frameworks, APIs) are exposed in the feature definition.
Requirements must be testable and unambiguous.
The specification is ready to proceed to planning as all checklist items are complete.

structural_gaps.remediation_advice: This document is a checklist. Please provide the actual 'spec.md' file to extract the business goals and objectives.
The checklist confirms scope is bounded, but the boundaries are not defined here. Provide the primary specification document.
Checklist indicates no markers remain, but actual open questions for the API design are missing from this meta-document.
